lines.speaker: Miriam
lines.text: Can I help you today?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I go for a ride?

lines.speaker: Miriam
lines.text: Minecart rides are 20 coins.

lines.speaker: Miriam
lines.text: Of course.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm fine, thanks.

lines.speaker: Miriam
lines.text: Can I help you today?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I go for a ride?

lines.speaker: Miriam
lines.text: Of course.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm fine, thanks.

lines.speaker: Miriam
lines.text: As a loyal customer of the Lovakengj Minecart Network, you're entitled to this.

lines.speaker: Miriam
lines.text: Now, can I help you today?

sections.title: Attempting to travel to Lovakengj while already there

lines.speaker: Miriam
lines.text: You're already here, human.

sections.title: Before setting up the Lovakengj Minecart Network

lines.speaker: Miriam
lines.text: Hello, human. Can I help you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is this place?

lines.speaker: Miriam
lines.text: This is the principal station of the Lovakengj Minecart Network. Once it's running, our people will be able to travel rapidly all across the city.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I ride your minecart?

lines.speaker: Miriam
lines.text: The network is for the citizens of Lovakengj only, though I'll let you use it if you help me first. Free up some inventory space if you're interested.

lines.speaker: Miriam
lines.text: The network is for the citizens of Lovakengj only, though I'll let you use it if you help me first.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Alright, what do you need me to do?

lines.speaker: Miriam
lines.text: The workers at the other stations got incorrect versions of the control scrolls, so they can't operate the minecarts. Please take these updated scrolls to them.

lines.speaker: Miriam
lines.text: That's one scroll each for the Arceuus station, the Shayzien station, the Hosidius station, the Piscarilius station and the Quidamortem station.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where do I need to go?

lines.speaker: Miriam
lines.text: The Arceuus station is just next to the Arceuus Library, in the north of the city.

lines.speaker: Miriam
lines.text: The Shayzien station is east of the Shayzien Encampment.

lines.speaker: Miriam
lines.text: The Hosidius station is north of the Woodcutting Guild.

lines.speaker: Miriam
lines.text: The Piscarilius station is south of the city, next to a small mine.

lines.speaker: Miriam
lines.text: The Quidamortem station is at the peak of the mountain, deep in the Kebos Lowlands.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I go for a ride now?

lines.speaker: Miriam
lines.text: No, you haven't unlocked any of the other stations yet.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do I have to pay every time I use the carts?

lines.speaker: Miriam
lines.text: Hmmm... We normally charge 50 coins per ride. For 100,000 coins, you'll never have to pay again.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: 100,000 coins is a rip-off!

lines.speaker: Miriam
lines.text: Take it or leave it, human! You may enjoy being about to ride our carts without having to carry coins every time.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd rather not, thanks.

lines.speaker: Miriam
lines.text: Can I do anything else for you, human?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll get on with it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm not interested.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm fine, thanks.

sections.title: While setting up the Lovakengj Minecart Network
Using a Minecart control scroll on her

lines.speaker: Miriam
lines.text: No thanks, I don't want it back.

lines.speaker: Miriam
lines.text: Some of my stations still require control scrolls.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Have you got any more scrolls?

lines.speaker: Miriam
lines.text: Yes, but you don't have room in your inventory.

lines.speaker: Miriam
lines.text: Here you go, human.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where do I need to go?

lines.speaker: Miriam
lines.text: The Arceuus station is just next to the Arceuus Library, in the north of the city.

lines.speaker: Miriam
lines.text: The Shayzien station is east of the Shayzien Encampment.

lines.speaker: Miriam
lines.text: The Hosidius station is north of the Woodcutting Guild.

lines.speaker: Miriam
lines.text: The Piscarilius station is south of the city, next to a small mine.

lines.speaker: Miriam
lines.text: The Quidamortem station is at the peak of the mountain, deep in the Kebos Lowlands.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I go for a ride now?

lines.speaker: Miriam
lines.text: No, you haven't unlocked any of the other stations yet.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll get on with it.

sections.title: After setting up the Lovakengj Minecart Network

lines.speaker: Miriam
lines.text: Thanks for delivering those control scrolls, human. What can I do for you today?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I go for a ride now?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm fine, thanks.
